checks.name: vocabulary_registry_complete
checks.description: OperationalVocabulary.js contains allowed verbs, nouns, adjectives and forbidden patterns

checks.name: forbidden_patterns_comprehensive
checks.description: FORBIDDEN_PATTERNS covers organizational attribution, prediction, AI theater, consulting language

checks.name: primitive_count_corrected
checks.description: 5 projection primitives (down from 8): projectPosture, projectReinforcementFlow, projectPrimaryStory, composeEpicenterFacts, composeTrustCalibration
checks.detail: 6 derivation primitives removed. 2 topology projections retained. 3 new projection orchestration primitives added.

checks.name: no_parallel_cognition_path
checks.description: No primitive reads raw signal_interpretations to derive operational meaning. All cognition consumed from forBalanced().
checks.detail: projectPosture consumes posture_label+combined_synthesis. projectReinforcementFlow consumes reinforcement_flow. projectPrimaryStory consumes primary_story. Only composeEpicenterFacts and composeTrustCalibration read fullReport — for topology display data, not cognition.

checks.name: evidence_chain_sources_corrected
checks.description: Evidence chains point to forBalanced() output, not raw signal_interpretations

checks.name: zone_definitions_complete
checks.description: ZONE_DEFINITIONS covers Z1-Z5 with cognitive_role, question, renders, visual_weight, pacing

checks.name: zone_transitions_defined
checks.description: 4 zone transitions (Z1→Z2, Z2→Z3, Z3→Z4, Z4→Z5) with cognitive bridges

checks.name: anti_patterns_registered
checks.description: 7 anti-patterns: PROSE_DRIFT, STACKED_CARD_SYNDROME, GOVERNANCE_REGRESSION, METADATA_OVERLOAD, DENSE_LEAKAGE, COGNITIVE_RESET, SW_INTEL_REPLACEMENT

checks.name: audience_contract_defined
checks.description: AUDIENCE_CONTRACT specifies primary/secondary audiences, cognitive mode, wants, does_not_want

checks.name: composer_input_contract_corrected
checks.description: composeBriefing takes (balancedProjection, synthesisResult, fullReport) — not just fullReport

checks.name: composer_gates_on_projection
checks.description: composeBriefing returns { valid: false, reason: 'NO_CONSEQUENCE_PROJECTION' } when balancedProjection is null

checks.name: composition_rules_corrected
checks.description: BALANCED_MAY lists projection operations. BALANCED_MAY_NOT explicitly forbids parallel cognition derivation.

checks.name: no_boardroom_changes
checks.description: No files outside balanced/ directory modified

checks.name: no_consequence_compiler_semantics_changed
checks.description: ConsequenceCompiler.js not modified. forBalanced() consumed as-is.

checks.name: cognition_source_tracked
checks.description: Briefing metadata includes cognition_source: 'ConsequenceCompiler.forBalanced()' for runtime lineage

checks.name: no_forbidden_language_in_templates
checks.description: All POSTURE_HEADLINES, CONVERGENCE_TEMPLATES, TRUST_TEMPLATES pass validateSentence

reconciliation_note: Phase 1 was corrected after BALANCED_COMPOSITION_ARCHITECTURE_RECONCILIATION.md identified 6/8 primitives as parallel cognition violations. All derivation primitives replaced with projection orchestration primitives that consume forBalanced() output.
